name: Standard All Star Sports Kids' Pillow Sham Blue - Pillowfort™
description: This Standard All Star Sports Pillow Sham from Pillowfort™ adds warmth and personality to your child's room. The microfiber sham showcases a box-stitched front in navy blue with a tufted typographic design that reads "All Star" in red and white with a white star, contrasted by a bright red reverse side with matching red piping trim. Made from 100% recycled polyester and backing, this machine-washable sham with a six-inch envelope closure adds comfort and functional style to their bedroom linen collection.
